_comment_scenario: scenarios/146-oci-slsa-untrusted-builder — CICD-SEC-9 (Improper Artifact Integrity Validation) — OCI image-index + SLSA in-toto attestation. This is an OCI image-layout: index.json references a runtime manifest plus a BuildKit attestation manifest, whose in-toto Statement blob lives under blobs/sha256/. DANGER (1): the SLSA provenance attests a self-hosted builder identity the SLSA contract cannot vouch for (a compromised self-hosted runner can mint a signature-valid attestation for a tampered image). DANGER (2): the Statement subject carries no digest, so the attestation binds to no actual image bytes. SAFETY: static fixture nested under scenarios/; nothing pulls this image, pipeline-check parses the layout statically. See README.md.
